# Security Checklist: Show Missing-Data Warnings in UI

**Purpose**: Validate safe handling of incomplete metadata and logging.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/026-missing-data-warnings/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Malformed metadata does not crash the UI.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Generic warning is shown when metadata is incomplete.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Malformed metadata is logged for debugging.
